title: SFP | Herbst Theatre
content: Herbst Theatre is part of the War Memorial Performing Arts Center and across the street from City Hall on Van Ness Avenue in San Francisco. Rideshare services generally pick up and drop off at the corner of McAllister and Van Ness. * Performing Arts Garage—Entrance at 360 Grove (between Franklin and Gough). * UC Hastings College of Law Garage—Entrance on Larkin (between McAllister and Golden Gate). * Civic Center Plaza Garage—Entrance on McAllister (between Polk and Larkin). * Opera Plaza Parking Garage—Entrance on Golden Gate (between Van Ness and Franklin). The Veterans Building is a short walk from the Civic Center BART and MUNI stations as well as the Van Ness MUNI station. MUNI’s 49 bus line runs along Van Ness and passes directly by the theater; the 5 bus runs along McAllister and passes the theater. ## In the Neighborhood.
